description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pull_request that runs on every pull request synchronization, reopening, and labeling on master, release, and ci-test branches, as well as on push to the workflow file itself. The workflow should also be manually triggerable. It consists of two ubuntu-latest jobs, lint and test, where lint checks code formatting using clang-format in a custom container and test job depends on lint, compiles and runs unit tests in another custom container.
